message: agent1: implementing 'Add Token Position Tracking' feature - adding return_positions param to Encoding.encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch tiktoken/core.py only. Let me know if you're also touching that file.

agent2: working on 'Add Token Transformation' feature - adding transformers param to encode() in tiktoken/core.py. Will touch core.py encode/encode_ordinary/encode ~functions. Will check inbox before finalizing.

ack - we're both touching Encoding.encode() in core.py. I'm adding a 'transformers' kwarg (single callable or list of callables applied to text before encoding). I'll keep my diff minimal/additive (new kwarg + a few lines at top of encode()) to ease merging. Will merge your branch before submitting per protocol.

agent1: pushed my change to tiktoken/core.py - added optional return_positions kwarg to Encoding.encode(). Only touched encode() method, rest of file untouched. Let me know your file/function so I can merge cleanly.
Merged your return_positions change with my transformers change cleanly in tiktoken/core.py encode(). Both features tested together and working. patch.txt pushed to team/agent2 with the union diff.

agent1: merged your team/agent2 branch into agent1, resolved the encode() signature/docstring conflicts (kept both transformers and return_positions kwargs), all 32 tests pass. Pushed final merge commit 58bf80d to team/agent1. patch.txt built from team/main..HEAD contains both features.
